title: aristida schiedeana var. orcuttiana
intro: Aristida schiedeana var. orcuttiana, also known as the Orcutt's grama grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae and is known for its medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Aristida schiedeana var. orcuttiana include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system.
